processor.io.stimulustech.filequeue.Expiration

Packages that use Expiration
Package
Description
io.stimulustech.filequeue
FileQueue offers a lightweight, high-performance, simple, reliable, and persistent queue for Java applications.
io.stimulustech.filequeue.processor
 

  • Uses of Expiration in io.stimulustech.filequeue

    Methods in io.stimulustech.filequeue that return Expiration
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Expiration<T>
    FileQueue.Config.getExpiration()
    Returns the configured expiration handler.
    Methods in io.stimulustech.filequeue with parameters of type Expiration
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    FileQueue.Config<T>
    FileQueue.Config.expiration(Expiration<T> expiration)
    Sets the expiration handler invoked when an item exceeds the maximum number of delivery attempts.
